heading: Identification required to purchase certain monetary instruments
label: 5325 Identification required to purchase certain monetary instruments
notes: References in TextSection 19(b)(1)(C) of the Federal Reserve Act, referred to in subsec. (c), is classified to , Banks and Banking.section 461(b)(1)(C) of Title 12

children.label: A
children.text: verifies that fact through a signature card or other information maintained by such institution in connection with the account of such individual; and

children.label: B
children.text: records the method of verification in accordance with regulations which the Secretary of the Treasury shall prescribe; or

the individual furnishes the financial institution with such forms of identification as the Secretary of the Treasury may require in regulations which the Secretary shall prescribe and the financial institution verifies and records such information in accordance with regulations which such Secretary shall prescribe.

children.heading: .—Report to Secretary Upon Request
children.label: b .—Report to Secretary Upon Request
children.text: Any information required to be recorded by any financial institution under paragraph (1) or (2) of subsection (a) shall be reported by such institution to the Secretary of the Treasury at the request of such Secretary.

children.heading: .—Transaction Account Defined
children.label: c .—Transaction Account Defined
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “transaction account” has the meaning given to such term in section 19(b)(1)(C) of the Federal Reserve Act.
